_comment: Elasticsearch Serverless: shards/replicas are auto-managed, no settings needed
_doc_comment: F0RT1KA Test Catalog Index - Stores test metadata for enrichment of RECEIPT events

category._comment: Auto-derived from directory: cyber-hygiene, intel-driven, mitre-top10, phase-aligned

subcategory._comment: Secondary classification: ransomware, apt, c2, baseline, etc.

tactics._comment: MITRE ATT&CK tactic names in kebab-case (e.g., defense-evasion)

severity._comment: Impact level: critical, high, medium, low, informational

target._comment: Target platforms/components: active-directory, windows-endpoint, web-app, cloud-aws, etc.

threat_actor._comment: APT group attribution: APT29, Lazarus, REvil, SafePay, etc.
